responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Build and deploy enterprise data protection architecture (PITR, immutable backups, disaster recovery, owner Recovery Center) for IVX Holdings, after completing reels/video car updates and app color alignment

## Constraints & Preferences
- Owner account must NEVER sign in automatically â€” manual email + password required on every launch (VERIFIED)
- "Remember Me" must be OFF by default (IMPLEMENTED)
- App colors must match landing page exactly â€” black/gold IVX theme with `#00C48C` green, `#FF4D4D` red, `#4A90D9` blue (VERIFIED)
- Reels on app must match landing page (`ivx-reels.js`) end-to-end: filters, engagement, deal CTAs, save/follow/report (DONE)
- Do not overwrite production during testing
- Do not fabricate restore evidence â€” a snapshot is not successful until restored and validated
- Do not store all backups in same project/account as production
- Never print/expose secret values â€” only show PRESENT/MISSING and last 4 chars
- Do not change Android package name (`com.ivxholdings.app`) or iOS bundle identifier
- Do not create a new project, replace IVX, reset repo, switch to localhost, or add Rork runtime dependencies

## Progress
### Done
- **Owner auto-login removal FULLY IMPLEMENTED, DEPLOYED, AND VERIFIED**:
  - Commits `c67f8a2`, `e831c8d`, `e936eef`; deploy `dep-d99r34v7f7vs73b7mfs0` live
  - All 3 auto-login paths blocked in `auth-context.tsx`; `manualOwnerLoginRef` guards `onAuthStateChange`
  - `restoreOwnerResilientSession()` removed from 3 files; `doLogout()` clears all owner SecureStore keys
  - "Remember Me" checkbox added to `login.tsx` â€” OFF by default
- **Reels + home video car update DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED**:
  - Commit `43620be` â€” 5 files, 844 insertions / 158 deletions
  - `expo/lib/video-platform.ts` (NEW): Engagement helpers â€” save, follow, report, analytics, stories, live, viewer ID, share URL, channels
  - `expo/app/videos.tsx` FULLY REWRITTEN: Channel filter chips, double-tap like, save/follow/report, progress bar, deal badges/metrics/CTAs, comments/share sheets
  - `expo/components/DealVideoCard.tsx` FULLY REWRITTEN: Real backend engagement, deal chips, investment options, View Deal + Invest Now CTAs
  - `expo/lib/video-feed.ts`: Added `creator_id` to `FeedVideo` interface
  - Deploy `dep-d99rci0k1i2s73elf9q0` â€” live
- **App color alignment with landing page DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED**:
  - Commit `80e37ec` â€” 3 files, 21 insertions / 21 deletions
  - Fixed 5 mismatches: `textSecondary` `#999999`â†’`#909090`, `textTertiary`/`muted` `#666666`â†’`#555555`, `success`/`green` `#22C55E`â†’`#00C48C`, `error`/`red` `#EF4444`â†’`#FF4D4D`, `info`/`blue` `#3B82F6`â†’`#4A90D9`
  - Fixed hardcoded `#22C55E`â†’`#00C48C` in `videos.tsx` and `DealVideoCard.tsx`
  - Deploy `dep-d99rgdu7r5hc73bo85f0` â€” live
- **Enterprise data protection architecture BUILT, COMMITTED, security tests pass**:
  - Commit `90437fd` â€” 13 files, 2854 insertions / 667 deletions
  - 7 new backend services: `ivx-enterprise-recovery-config.ts`, `ivx-storage-backup.ts`, `ivx-backup-validation.ts`, `ivx-financial-protection.ts`, `ivx-recovery-monitoring.ts`, `ivx-data-loss-guard-deps.ts`, `ivx-enterprise-recovery.test.ts`
  - 1 new backend API: `ivx-enterprise-recovery.ts` â€” 14 new endpoints
  - Strengthened `ivx-data-loss-guard.ts`: 22 new protected tables (50+ total), 5 new guard rules (reauth, impact preview, soft-delete first, two-person approval for financial, enhanced type)
  - 2 new Expo files: `enterprise-recovery-client.ts`, `app/admin/data-recovery.tsx`
  - `docs/DISASTER-RECOVERY-RUNBOOK.md`: 10 incident scenarios
  - All wired into `hono.ts`
  - Security tests: 39/39 pass
  - TypeScript: 0 errors
- **Pre-existing recovery infrastructure audited** (built 2026-07-06):
  - 10 backend services: `ivx-data-vault.ts`, `ivx-data-loss-guard.ts`, `ivx-soft-delete.ts`, `ivx-vault-table.ts`, `ivx-recovery-drill.ts`, `ivx-recovery-report.ts`, `ivx-pitr-status.ts`, `ivx-two-person-approval.ts`, `ivx-owner-recovery-audit.ts`, `ivx-sns-sms.ts`
  - 29 existing API endpoints in restore-center + data-vault + data-guard
  - Destructive ops audit trail has real blocked entries
  - Boot-time vault scheduler activated in `hono.ts`

### In Progress
- **Enterprise data protection deployment NOT YET LIVE on Render** â€” commit `90437fd` pushed to Rork git router but GitHub sync is pending (GitHub HEAD still `d503acfd`, not `90437fd`). Render deploy `dep-d99rnhrtqb8s73b2knn0` went live but from old GitHub commit. New recovery endpoints return 404 on live server.

### Blocked
- **GitHub sync delay** â€” Rork git router â†’ GitHub mirror is async; commit `90437fd` hasn't appeared on GitHub yet, so Render can't deploy it
- **PITR confirmation** â€” requires owner to check Supabase Dashboard â†’ Database â†’ Backups; backend cannot verify PITR enablement programmatically
- **Off-site/cross-account backup** â€” requires owner-controlled AWS S3 bucket with separate credentials; not yet configured
- **Immutable backup storage** â€” requires object lock/immutability on separate storage; not yet configured
- **APK build** â€” sandbox OOM kills Gradle; recommended EAS Build or building on a real computer

## Key Decisions
- RPO target: 5 min (PITR WAL); RTO target: 60 min (vault restore); critical RPO: 1 min; storage RPO: 24h; daily retention: 35d; monthly: 12mo; drill: 30d; DR drill: 90d
- Data-loss guard strengthened with 5 new rules: reauthentication within 15min, impact preview required, soft-delete first (except emergencies), two-person approval for financial tables, enhanced `DestructiveOpRequest` type with `ownerReauthAt`, `twoPersonApproved`, `impactPreviewShown`, `softDeleteAttempted`
- 50+ protected tables now include financial (transactions, deposits, revenue, fees), communications (conversations, messages, chat_attachments), audit (audit_logs, variables_metadata), and registrations
- Owner Recovery Center screen at `/admin/data-recovery` shows: overall status, quick actions, objectives, monitoring, PITR, validation, vault, guard, financial, storage, runbook link
- Landing page CSS variables are the source of truth for app colors
- `#448AFF` used for JV Deal icon in reels â€” landing page uses `#4A90D9` for info/blue but JV Deal blue was kept as `#448AFF` (not in landing CSS vars)
- `newArchEnabled: false` kept in app.config.ts and gradle.properties
- `isRorkDomain()` guard in `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts` KEPT as IVX defense mechanism

## Next Steps
1. Wait for GitHub sync to complete (Rork git router â†’ GitHub mirror of commit `90437fd`)
2. Trigger fresh Render deploy once GitHub HEAD shows `90437fd`
3. Verify new recovery endpoints return 401 (not 404) on live server â€” confirms routes registered
4. Owner must confirm PITR in Supabase Dashboard â†’ Database â†’ Backups
5. Configure off-site AWS S3 backup bucket with separate credentials
6. Enable immutable/object-lock on backup storage
7. Run first full restore drill into isolated environment
8. Test Data Recovery Center screen on device (navigate to `/admin/data-recovery`)
9. Verify financial reconciliation passes with live data
10. Run storage bucket audit against live Supabase

## Critical Context
- Project root: `/home/user/rork-app`, Expo root: `/home/user/rork-app/expo`, Backend root: `/home/user/rork-app/backend`
- **Current git branch**: `main`
- **Local HEAD**: `90437fd` (ENTERPRISE DATA PROTECTION)
- **GitHub HEAD**: `d503acfd` (SYNC PENDING â€” Rork git router delay)
- **Render: LIVE** but running old commit `d503acfd` â€” new recovery endpoints return 404
- **Live
